description_long: This sculpture depicts two angelic figures, one larger and one smaller, both with detailed wings and flowing robes. The larger angel stands protectively behind the smaller one, who appears to be holding a wreath or garland. The wings of the larger angel are intricately textured and spread wide, creating a dramatic backdrop. The figures are rendered in a classical style, with soft facial features and gentle postures, and the entire piece rests on a rectangular stone base. The back of the sculpture features the wings and a vertical support, possibly a cross or pillar, adding structural stability. The surface is predominantly white with some weathering and discoloration, suggesting it is made of stone or concrete.
description: A classical white sculpture of two angels, one standing protectively behind the other, both with detailed wings and flowing robes, set on a stone base.
description_view_0: Front view showing both angelic figures, with the larger angel standing behind the smaller one, both facing forward and displaying detailed wings and robes.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the sculpture, the layered arrangement of the figures, and the texture of the wings and robes.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the large wings and a vertical support structure, with the figures mostly obscured.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the figures and the draping of their garments, with the base clearly visible.
attribute_subject_matter: two angelic figures in classical style
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
